title: Affiliated Projects
description:
The following projects are affiliated with Marine Life 2030 and endorsed by the UN Decade of Ocean Science for Sustainable Development (UN Ocean Decade). Please email marinelife2030@gmail.com if you would like to be connected with the leads of any of these projects.

html:
The following projects are affiliated with Marine Life 2030 and endorsed by the UN Decade of Ocean Science for Sustainable Development (UN Ocean Decade). Please email [email protected] if you would like to be connected with the leads of any of these projects.

In addition to the affiliated projects listed below, the Marine Life 2030 Ocean Decade Programme values and seeks active engagement with other UN Ocean Decade Programmes.

If you are engaged in a UN Ocean Decade Programme and are interested in coordinating with Marine Life 2030, please email us at [email protected].

Above and Beyond – Completing the World Register of Marine Species

Project Lead: Leen Vendepitte, Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), Belgium

The Cozumel Coral Conservatory

Project Lead: Colleen Flanigan, Living Sea Sculpture, USA

NE Pacific Coastal Biodiversity Action Network

Project Lead: Romney Mcphie, Hakai Institute (Tula Foundation), Canada

Somos OceanoS: Ocean Stories for Conservation

Project Lead: Veronica Relano, Sea Around Us, University of British Columbia, Canada

MetaZooGene: Metabarcoding Zooplankton Diversity

Project Lead: Ann Bucklin, University of Connecticut, USA

Ocean Tracking Network

Project Lead: Frederick Whoriskey, Ocean Tracking Network, Dalhousie University, Canada

MIGRAVIAS: Connecting Marine Protected Areas (MPAs) through ocean swimways to protect migratory routes and critical habitats of endangered species

Project Lead: Rosario Alvarez, MigraMar, USA

Baffin Bay Oceanography and Biodiversity

Project Lead: Kevin Hedges, Fisheries and Ocean Canada, Arctic Aquatic Research Division, Canada

South East Australia – Marine Ecosystem Study

Project Lead: Rich Little, Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO), Australia

Canada’s Coastal Environmental Baseline Program

Project Lead: Caroline Longtin, Fisheries and Oceans Canada, Canada

Monitoring of the deep-sea organisms for MPAs

Project Lead: Akinori Yabuki, Japan Agency for Marine-Earth Science and Technology (JAMSTEC), Japan

Submersible Technology to Advance Reef Science

Project Lead: Neil van Niekerk, 2DegreesC, USA

Gain Knowledge to Respond to Multiple Stressors

Project Leads: Alejandro Acosta, Francisco Arias, and Fadilah Ali, Tropical Americas and Caribbean Regional Planning Group, Colombia

TAC Pollutants Observatory

Project Leads: Soraya Silva and Fadilah Ali, Tropical Americas and Caribbean Regional Planning Group, Colombia

Gulf of Naples Integrated Pelagic Observatory

Project Lead: Priscila Licandro, Stazione Zoologica ‘Anton Dohrn’, Italy

Portuguese Coastal Monitoring Network

Project Lead: Paola Castellanos, MARE – Marine and Environmental Science Centre, University of Libson, Portugal

Beaufort Ecosystem Biodiversity

Project Lead: Lisa Loseto, Fisheries and Oceans Canada, Canada

Unifying Approaches to Marine Connectivity for Improved Resource Management for the Seas (Completed)

Project Lead: Audrey Darnaude, Center for MARine Biodiversity, Exploitation & Conservation (MARBEC), France

Nord Observations and Research on Marine Life

  • MBON Europe

Project Lead: Mark Costello, Nord University, Norway

Marine Biodiversity and Economy Program (MBEP)

Project Lead: Hélène Leriche, RespectOcean, France

OBIS 2030 – The Biodiversity Data Hub for the Ocean Decade Actions

Project Lead: Ward Appeltans, Intergovernmental Oceanographic Commission of UNESCO, Belgium

Ocean Vision AI: Scaling Up Marine Life Observing

Project Lead: Kakani Katija, Monterey Bay Aquarium Research Institute (MBARI), USA

Hybrid Governance to Protect and Manage High Seas

Project Lead: Denis Bailly, Université de Bretagne Occidentale / Institut Universitaire Européen de la Mer / UMR 6308 AMURE, France

Ocean Decade Expeditions

Project Lead: Graeme Stewart-Robertson, SOI Foundation, Canada

New Copernicus Capability for Ocean Food Networks

Project Lead: Stefanno Ciavatta, Mercator Ocean International (MOi), France

The Grass Underwater Project

Project Lead: Ailars David, Sustainable Ocean Alliance, Tanzania

Coastal and Marine Ecological Classification Standard

Project Lead: Kate Rose, Interagency Working Group on Ocean and Coastal Mapping (IWG-OCM), United States

Picture Perfect: Rapid Classification of Plankton

Project Lead: Keshnee Pillay, Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment, South Africa

Kelp Forest Challenge

Project Lead: Aaron Eger, Kelp Forest Alliance, Australia

Developing a Conservation Plan for Maui’s Corals

Project Lead: Igor Pessoa, University of California-Santa Cruz, USA

Biodiversity in Northern European Seagrass Meadows – Drivers, Responses, and Resilience (NORSE)

SPACEWHALE for Designating Marine Protected Areas

MINKA Citizen Science Observatory

Project Lead: Christophe Prazuck, Sorbonne, France

markdown:
The following projects are affiliated with Marine Life 2030 and endorsed by the UN Decade of Ocean Science for Sustainable Development (UN Ocean Decade). Please email [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#5c313d2e35323930353a396e6c6f6c1c3b313d3530723f3331) if you would like to be connected with the leads of any of these projects.

In addition to the affiliated projects listed below, the Marine Life 2030 Ocean Decade Programme values and seeks active engagement with other UN Ocean Decade Programmes. 

If you are engaged in a UN Ocean Decade Programme and are interested in coordinating with Marine Life 2030, please email us at [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#513c3023383f343d3837346361626111363c30383d7f323e3c). 

#### [Above and Beyond – Completing the World Register of Marine Species](https://oceandecade.org/actions/above-and-beyond-completing-the-world-register-of-marine-species-abc-worms/)

Project Lead: Leen Vendepitte, Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), Belgium

#### [The Cozumel Coral Conservatory](https://oceandecade.org/actions/the-cozumel-coral-conservatory/)

Project Lead: Colleen Flanigan, Living Sea Sculpture, USA

#### [NE Pacific Coastal Biodiversity Action Network](https://oceandecade.org/actions/ne-pacific-coastal-biodiversity-action-network/)

Project Lead: Romney Mcphie, Hakai Institute (Tula Foundation), Canada

#### [Somos OceanoS: Ocean Stories for Conservation](https://oceandecade.org/actions/somos-oceanos-ocean-stories-for-conservation/)

Project Lead: Veronica Relano, Sea Around Us, University of British Columbia, Canada

#### [MetaZooGene: Metabarcoding Zooplankton Diversity](https://oceandecade.org/actions/metazoogene-metabarcoding-zooplankton-diversity/)

Project Lead: Ann Bucklin, University of Connecticut, USA

#### [Ocean Tracking Network](https://oceandecade.org/actions/ocean-tracking-network/)

Project Lead: Frederick Whoriskey, Ocean Tracking Network, Dalhousie University, Canada

#### [MIGRAVIAS: Connecting Marine Protected Areas (MPAs) through ocean swimways to protect migratory routes and critical habitats of endangered species](https://oceandecade.org/actions/migravias-connecting-marine-protected-areas-mpas-through-ocean-swimways-to-protect-migratory-routes-and-critical-habitats-of-endangered-species/)

Project Lead: Rosario Alvarez, MigraMar, USA

#### [Baffin Bay Oceanography and Biodiversity](https://oceandecade.org/actions/baffin-bay-oceanography-and-biodiversity/)

Project Lead: Kevin Hedges, Fisheries and Ocean Canada, Arctic Aquatic Research Division, Canada

#### [South East Australia – Marine Ecosystem Study](https://oceandecade.org/actions/south-east-australia-marine-ecosystem-study/)

Project Lead: Rich Little, Commonwealth Scientific and Industrial Research Organisation (CSIRO), Australia

#### [Canada’s Coastal Environmental Baseline Program](https://oceandecade.org/actions/canadas-coastal-environmental-baseline-program/)

Project Lead: Caroline Longtin, Fisheries and Oceans Canada, Canada

#### [Monitoring of the deep-sea organisms for MPAs](https://oceandecade.org/actions/monitoring-of-the-deep-sea-organisms-for-mpas/)

Project Lead: Akinori Yabuki, Japan Agency for Marine-Earth Science and Technology (JAMSTEC), Japan

#### [Submersible Technology to Advance Reef Science](https://oceandecade.org/actions/submersible-technology-to-advance-reef-science/)

Project Lead: Neil van Niekerk, 2DegreesC, USA

#### [Gain Knowledge to Respond to Multiple Stressors](https://oceandecade.org/actions/gain-knowledge-to-respond-to-multiple-stressors/)

Project Leads: Alejandro Acosta, Francisco Arias, and Fadilah Ali, Tropical Americas and Caribbean Regional Planning Group, Colombia

#### [TAC Pollutants Observatory](https://oceandecade.org/actions/tac-pollutants-observatory/)

Project Leads: Soraya Silva and Fadilah Ali, Tropical Americas and Caribbean Regional Planning Group, Colombia

#### [Gulf of Naples Integrated Pelagic Observatory](https://oceandecade.org/actions/gulf-of-naples-integrated-pelagic-observatory/)

Project Lead: Priscila Licandro, Stazione Zoologica ‘Anton Dohrn’, Italy

#### [Portuguese Coastal Monitoring Network](https://oceandecade.org/actions/portuguese-coastal-monitoring-network-coastnet-2/)

Project Lead: Paola Castellanos, MARE – Marine and Environmental Science Centre, University of Libson, Portugal

#### [Beaufort Ecosystem Biodiversity](https://oceandecade.org/actions/beaufort-ecosystem-biodiversity/)

Project Lead: Lisa Loseto, Fisheries and Oceans Canada, Canada

#### [Unifying Approaches to Marine Connectivity for Improved Resource Management for the Seas (Completed)](https://oceandecade.org/actions/unifying-approaches-to-marine-connectivity-for-improved-resource-management-for-the-seassea-unicorn/)

Project Lead: Audrey Darnaude, Center for MARine Biodiversity, Exploitation & Conservation (MARBEC), France

#### [Nord Observations and Research on Marine Life](https://oceandecade.org/actions/nord-observations-and-research-on-marine-life/)

  * [MBON Europe](https://euromarinenetwork.eu/activities/mbon-europe/)



Project Lead: Mark Costello, Nord University, Norway

#### [The Grass Underwater Project](https://oceandecade.org/actions/the-grass-underwater-project/)

Project Lead: Ailars David, Sustainable Ocean Alliance, Tanzania

#### [Coastal and Marine Ecological Classification Standard](https://oceandecade.org/actions/coastal-marine-ecological-classification-std/)

Project Lead: Kate Rose, Interagency Working Group on Ocean and Coastal Mapping (IWG-OCM), United States

#### [Picture Perfect: Rapid Classification of Plankton](https://oceandecade.org/actions/picture-perfect-rapid-classification-of-plankton/)

Project Lead: Keshnee Pillay, Department of Forestry, Fisheries and the Environment, South Africa

#### [Biodiversity in Northern European Seagrass Meadows – Drivers, Responses, and Resilience (NORSE)](https://oceandecade.org/actions/biodiversity-in-northern-european-seagrass-meadows-norse/)

Project Lead: Karine Gagnon, HAVFORSKNINGSINSTITUTTET, Norway

#### [SPACEWHALE for Designating Marine Protected Areas](https://oceandecade.org/actions/spacewhale-for-designating-marine-protected-areas/)

#### [MINKA Citizen Science Observatory](https://oceandecade.org/actions/minka-citizen-science-observatory/)

#### [OceanGreen](https://oceandecade.org/actions/oceangreen/)

Project Lead: Dagny Elise Anastassiou, Ava Ocean, Norway

#### [Bougainville Project](https://oceandecade.org/actions/bougainville-project/)

Project Lead: Christophe Prazuck, Sorbonne, France

#### [Plankton Biodiversity Through Remote Sensing and Omics](https://oceandecade.org/actions/plankton-biodiversity-through-remote-sensing-and-omics/)

Project Lead: Marco Talone, Institut de Ciències del Mar (ICM-CSIC), Spain

#### [Long-Term Effects of Environmental Changes on Arctic Seabirds: Effects of Seasonal Distribution and Contamination on Population Dynamics (ACCUMULATION)](https://oceandecade.org/actions/long-term-effects-of-environmental-changes-on-arctic-seabirds-accumulation/)

Project Lead: Celine Albert, Norwegian Institute for Nature Research (NINA), Norway

#### [Biofábrica de Corais: Integrated Reef Restoration](https://oceandecade.org/actions/biofabrica-de-corais-integrated-reef-restoration/)

Project Lead: Rudã Fernandes Brandão Santos, Biofábrica de corais, Brazil

#### [Nestlé Purina Petcare Europe Ocean Restoration](https://oceandecade.org/actions/nestle-purina-petcare-europe-ocean-restoration/)
